name: New England Chuck Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 Celery stalk, cut into eight chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chuck roast with salt and pepper.
2. Place onions, carrots, and celery in the crockpot.
3. Top the vegetables with the meat.
4. Add bay leaf, vinegar, and water to the pot.
5. Cover the pot and cook on low for 5-7 hours or until the meat is tender.
6. Remove the meat from the pot and set aside.
7. Turn the crockpot to high heat.
8. Add cabbage wedges to the pot and cover. Cook on high for 15-20 minutes or until the cabbage is done.
9. Meanwhile, melt butter in a saucepan.
10. Stir in minced onion and flour until smooth.
11. Drain 1-1/2 cups of broth from the cooking pot into the saucepan with the butter mixture.
12. Add horseradish and salt to the saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and smooth.
13. Serve the sauce over the roast with vegetables.
